Bash(python -c "
import sys, os
os.environ['DB_TYPE'] = 'sqlite'

print\('1. init_db...'\)
from app.Api.db.sqlite_db import init_db
init_db\(\)
print\('   OK'\)

print\('2. mark_started...'\)
from app.Core.services.workflow_status_service import WorkflowStatusService
svc = WorkflowStatusService\(\)
svc.mark_started\('test-wf-1', workflow_selector='sel1', display_name='Test WF 1'\)
print\('   OK'\)

print\('3. mark_completed...'\)
svc.mark_completed\('test-wf-1', return_code=0, execution_id='exec-001', run_folder='/tmp/run1', workflow_selector='sel1', display_name='Test WF 1'\)
print\('   OK'\)

print\('4. get_status...'\)
status = svc.get_status\('test-wf-1'\)
print\(f'   completed={status[\\"completed\\"]}, last_return_code={status[\\"last_return_code\\"]}'\)

print\('5. get_execution_history...'\)
history = svc.get_execution_history\('test-wf-1'\)
print\(f'   total_items={history[\\"total_items\\"]}, items={len\(history[\\"items\\"]\)}'\)
if history['items']:
    print\(f'   first entry status={history[\\"items\\"][0][\\"status\\"]}'\)

print\('ALL TESTS PASSED'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, os
os.environ['DB_TYPE'] = 'sqlite'

from app.Api.db.sqlite_db import init_db
init_db\(\)

from app.Core.services.workflow_status_service import WorkflowStatusService
svc = WorkflowStatusService\(\)

print\('1. mark_started...'\)
svc.mark_started\('test-wf-1', workflow_selector='sel1', display_name='Test WF 1'\)
print\('   OK'\)

print\('2. mark_completed...'\)
svc.mark_completed\('test-wf-1', return_code=0, execution_id='exec-001', run_folder='/tmp/run1', workflow_selector='sel1', display_name='Test WF 1'\)
print\('   OK'\)

print\('3. get_status...'\)
status = svc.get_status\('test-wf-1'\)
print\(f'   completed={status[\\"completed\\"]}, last_return_code={status[\\"last_return_code\\"]}'\)

print\('4. get_execution_history...'\)
history = svc.get_execution_history\('test-wf-1'\)
print\(f'   total_items={history[\\"total_items\\"]}'\)
if history['items']:
    print\(f'   first entry: status={history[\\"items\\"][0][\\"status\\"]}'\)

print\('5. list_all_statuses...'\)
all_statuses = svc.list_all_statuses\(\)
print\(f'   count={len\(all_statuses\)}'\)

print\('ALL TESTS PASSED'\)
